description: Editorial cover with warm cream canvas, serif body pairing, and a single bold conclusion headline.
authoringHints: Eyebrow in [data-role=hero-eyebrow]. Conclusion title in [data-role=hero-title]. Subtitle or meta in [data-role=hero-subtitle].

description: Chapter break with oversized section number and part title on warm paper.
authoringHints: Part label in [data-role=section-number] (e.g. PART 02). Chapter title in [data-role=section-title]. Optional lead in [data-role=section-lead].

description: Horizontal four-node timeline with dots, titles, and short descriptions.
authoringHints: Page title in [data-role=page-title]. Each phase is [data-role=timeline-node] containing [data-role=timeline-title] and [data-role=timeline-desc].

description: Centered pull quote with attribution — ideal for design philosophy or key insight.
authoringHints: Quote text in [data-role=quote-text]. Attribution in [data-role=quote-by]. Keep quote under 120 chars.

description: 2fr + 1fr Bento grid: one large primary card and two stacked secondary cards.
authoringHints: Page title in [data-role=page-title]. Main card [data-role=bento-main]. Side cards [data-role=bento-side] (two items). Each card has title + body slots.
